name: Fat Free Buritos
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fat-free Mexican Cheddar Cheese (I use Kraft)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese with picante sauce and half of the cheddar cheese.
2. Mix seasoning with refried beans; chop lettuce, tomato, and onion.
3. Arrange these items in layers in the middle of the tortilla, sprinkle with a dash or two of hot sauce and some garlic powder.
4. Wrap; bake in a 375°F oven for 20 minutes or so.
5. Serve with vegetable rice and you have a fat-free Mexican meal, hard as it is to believe!
